_notes: Hand-verified 2026-04-24. COMM3030 Assessment Handbook ST 2026. Course code + name explicit in body. No lecturer block in front-matter portion extracted.

assessmentItems.name: Assessment 3: Participation & Peer Evaluation
assessmentItems.dueDate: Participation – Ongoing; Peer Evaluation – Friday 6th February by 5pm (Week 11)

learningObjectives: Partner with an organisation to address a social challenge to develop professional capabilities.
Identify, analyse and apply social entrepreneurship knowledge and skills to address a social challenge.
Participate collaboratively and responsibly in a team.
Reflect on your personal and professional development including an enhanced understanding of ethical, social and environmental issues.
Communicate complex ideas in a logical, succinct and persuasive manner.
